notes: These are chain-real reference markets on Arbitrum captured on 2026-05-01.
They are intended to prove prepare, deploy-calldata, and verify plumbing against live Morpho deployments.
Published reference config intentionally omits exact marketId literals to avoid false-positive scanner hits; derive those live when needed.
They are not Api3-backed oracle adapter targets. For Api3 integration work, replace oracleAddress values with deployed Morpho Api3 adapter addresses once that path exists.
